Shock.Effect: Fry enemy brains with logic loops, or discharge lightning that arcs perfectly between mathematically optimal targets

Calculation.Effect: Calculate the trajectory of incoming attacks before they happen, allowing you to sidestep with minimal effort, or create probability shields that force attacks to miss

Solving.Effect: Instantly solve any puzzle or cipher, analyze a structure to find its single weak point, or program spells to trigger only when specific conditions are met
